title: Kyiv: Casualties reported

description: Ukraine’s railway operator deploys 800 modular shelters amid surge in attacks. Ukrzaliznytsia has recorded 983 attacks on railway infrastructure since the start of 2026, with strikes also hitting passenger trains and causing civilian casualties.

title: Kyiv: Attack attack
title_en: Kyiv: Attack attack
description: Russian attacks on Ukrainian first responders rise, follow ‘sustained pattern,’ report finds. The report describes the trend as a “deeply troubling trajectory in the war,” finding a sustained pattern in which responders are repeatedly targeted while carrying out rescue operations, including after arriving at strike sites.
description_en: Russian attacks on Ukrainian first responders rise, follow ‘sustained pattern,’ report finds. The report describes the trend as a “deeply troubling trajectory in the war,” finding a sustained pattern in which responders are repeatedly targeted while carrying out rescue operations, including after arriving at strike sites.

title: Attack attack
title_en: Attack attack
description: The body of the second victim was recovered from the rubble of a kindergarten in Sumy. Thus, the number of victims of the Russian strike increased to two - women aged 48 and 46 died. Seven more people were injured, OVA reports.
description_en: The body of the second victim was recovered from the rubble of a kindergarten in Sumy. Thus, the number of victims of the Russian strike increased to two - women aged 48 and 46 died. Seven more people were injured, OVA reports.
description_uk: Из-под завалов детсада в Сумах достали тело второй погибшей Таким образом число жертв российского удара выросло до двух — погибли женщины 48 и 46 лет. Еще семь человек пострадали, сообщают в ОВА.

description: The corruption scandal Volodymyr Zelensky won’t confront When it comes to Ukraine’s largest corruption scandal, President Volodymyr Zelensky prefers to remain tight-lipped. Recent leaks, published by journalists and lawmakers over the past week, indicate that the largest corruption scandal affecting Zelensky’s inner circle has expanded beyond the energy sector. Photo: Omar Havana/AP Photo.

title: Ballistic missile launch detected
title_en: Ballistic missile launch detected
description: Today there is an important step of support from Norway - about 300 million dollars. to the PURL program. This is an important program that allows us to purchase scarce anti-ballistic missiles from the United States. Every day we need adequate protection from the vile Russian shelling. And I am grateful to Norway for its leadership, for its real support. The total amount of aid from Norway to PURL is already more than 1.2 billion dollars...
description_en: Today there is an important step of support from Norway - about 300 million dollars. to the PURL program. This is an important program that allows us to purchase scarce anti-ballistic missiles from the United States. Every day we need adequate protection from the vile Russian shelling. And I am grateful to Norway for its leadership, for its real support. The total amount of aid from Norway to PURL is already more than 1.2 billion dollars...
description_uk: Сьогодні є важливий крок підтримки з боку Норвегії – близько 300 млн дол. у програму PURL. Це важлива програма, завдяки якій ми можемо закуповувати у Сполучених Штатів дефіцитні антибалістичні ракети. Щодня нам потрібен достатній захист від підлих російських обстрілів. І я вдячний Норвегії за лідерство, за реальну підтримку. Загальна сума допомоги від Норвегії в PURL уже більш ніж 1,2 млрд дол....

description: EU ambassadors back new compensation mechanism for victims of Russia’s war. Aside from Ukraine itself, no country has so far ratified the International Claims Commission, the body that will handle compensation requests from the war’s victims.
description_en: EU ambassadors back new compensation mechanism for victims of Russia’s war. Aside from Ukraine itself, no country has so far ratified the International Claims Commission, the body that will handle compensation requests from the war’s victims.

title: Crimea: Attack attack
title_en: Crimea: Attack attack
description: 'Putin only cares about parades' — Russia violated Kyiv-proposed May 6 ceasefire 1,820 times, Ukraine says Moscow has also accused Kyiv of breaching its own ceasefire. Russian Foreign Ministry's Ambassador-at-Large Rodion Miroshnik said Ukraine had launched attacks on Russian-occupied Crimea and Russia's Bryansk Oblast.
description_en: 'Putin only cares about parades' — Russia violated Kyiv-proposed May 6 ceasefire 1,820 times, Ukraine says Moscow has also accused Kyiv of breaching its own ceasefire. Russian Foreign Ministry's Ambassador-at-Large Rodion Miroshnik said Ukraine had launched attacks on Russian-occupied Crimea and Russia's Bryansk Oblast.

title: Missile launch detected
title_en: Missile launch detected
description: Putin is testing nuclear-capable missiles for the first time in 1.5 years. Right before the parade in Moscow, "Military" of the Russian Federation announced missile tests at the "Kura" range in the Ust-Kamchatsky District from May 6 to 10. The presence of people and the movement of any equipment have already been banned on the territory. The last time such launches took place on October 29, 2024, when an intercontinental missile hit the test site...
description_en: Putin is testing nuclear-capable missiles for the first time in 1.5 years. Right before the parade in Moscow, "Military" of the Russian Federation announced missile tests at the "Kura" range in the Ust-Kamchatsky District from May 6 to 10. The presence of people and the movement of any equipment have already been banned on the territory. The last time such launches took place on October 29, 2024, when an intercontinental missile hit the test site...
description_uk: путин впервые за 1,5 года проводит испытания ракет с ядерным потенциалом. Прямо перед парадом в Москве, - "Милитарный" рф объявила о ракетных испытаниях на полигоне "Кура" в Усть-Камчатском округе с 6 по 10 мая. На территории уже запретили пребывание людей и движение любой техники. Последний раз подобные пуски проходили 29 октября 2024 года, когда по полигону ударили межконтинентальной ракетой...
